title: To His Book. (Another.)
content:
To read my book the virgin shy
    May blush while Brutus standeth by,
    But when he's gone, read through what's writ,
    And never stain a cheek for it.
meaning:
"To His Book. (Another.)" is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
